title: Authentication System Malfunction

scenario.summary: Users are reporting that they cannot access protected resources. Even after a successful login, all subsequent requests to private endpoints return 403 Forbidden. The frontend team insists they are sending the token correctly.

logs: 2026-06-17 10:00:05 auth INFO login success for user: john@example.com
2026-06-17 10:00:06 auth WARNING invalid token signature detected for email: john@example.com
